summary: Crisp, well‑captured audience sound paired with a solid show makes this Sublette‑sourced recording a prime example of the archive’s quality.
review: Both reviewers praise the clarity of the audio – noting how crisply the audience is captured – and describe the performance as fine. The recording appears to be sourced from a Sublette master (likely an audience or matrix feed) and delivers solid, listenable sound despite the limited detail on specific songs.

ai_rating.rationale: Positive comments about both the performance and the crisp recording outweigh the lack of detailed song discussion; two reviews (one 4‑star, one unscored but enthusiastic) give a solid overall impression.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers highlight crispness and good audience capture; no complaints about muddiness or drop‑outs.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers simply note the show as fine/prime.
